response.justification: While Aisha demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals with 16+ years of professional experience and proven expertise in testing, architecture, and mentoring, there is a critical mismatch with the role's core requirements. The position explicitly requires 8–12 years of C++ expertise and deep industrial automation/IoT domain knowledge; the candidate has only 6 months of professional C++ experience (2014-2015) and no background in industrial machinery, real-time systems, or embedded development. Additionally, there is no demonstrated experience with secure development lifecycle practices or IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards that are central to the role.
strengths: 16+ years of consistent professional experience with strong focus on testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship across diverse domains
Proven system architecture and design skills demonstrated through open-source projects and technical leadership roles
Full-stack capability with demonstrated ability to learn new domains and mentor team members across multiple technology stacks
concerns: Only 6 months of professional C++ experience in 2014-2015; primary expertise is TypeScript, JavaScript, and DLang for web and backend systems
Zero experience in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or real-time control; entire career focused on web and cloud rather than industrial machinery domain
No demonstrated experience with secure development lifecycle (SDL), IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards, or compliance-driven development required for the role

key_factors.factor: C++ expertise gap (6 months vs. 8-12 years required)
Software engineering fundamentals and mentoring ability
